overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dense, neon-lit urban district. The character navigates from a main commercial street under an elevated highway, through narrow service alleys with vending machines, up stairs to a plaza with a food vendor, and into winding back alleys with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street intersection with crosswalk

events.description: character crosses the pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
character turns left onto street with teal graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction
car driving down the street in the background

entered.detail: distinctive teal building with large circular window and multiple air conditioning units
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
tall black pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
illuminated signage for noodle shop with Japanese characters
long wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a sunny urban intersection, crossing a marked crosswalk past a distinctive green circular building. Walking along the sidewalk, they pass various commercial storefronts with neon signage before turning left onto a street lined with a graffiti-covered teal wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street beneath elevated highway with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: character walks under the elevated highway structure, entering a shaded corridor
large commercial trucks pass by on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to heavy vehicle traffic under an elevated monorail highway

notable_agents.action: large flatbed truck driving slowly in traffic alongside the sidewalk
heavier-set pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with monorail tracks casting shadows on the street below
large vertical advertisement featuring silhouetted tennis players on bright yellow background
cluster of wooden poles with tangled electrical and communication wires overhead
dense row of multi-story buildings with various signage and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure, the character moves through a canyon-like commercial street. Large billboards adorn the buildings on the left while heavy trucks pass by on the right. The overhead monorail tracks cast striped shadows across the scene as pedestrians walk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with vending machines leading to elevated plaza

events.description: character turns right into a narrow alleyway with red vending machines
character ascends concrete stairs between alley walls
character emerges from stairs into a sunlit plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow service alley, passing vending machines, climbing stairs, and emerging into a small plaza

notable_agents.action: person with green hair and neck tattoos standing near vending machines
person descending the concrete stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: corner of crimson painted building with metal trim and small windows
line of red and black automated vending machines with illuminated displays
wide concrete staircase leading up between building walls
walls covered in purple and blue spray paint tags and murals
modern concrete seating structure in the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow service alley lined with red vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. After passing a person with distinctive green hair, they climb a set of concrete stairs and emerge into a sunlit plaza with modern concrete benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with food vendor transitioning to neon-lit commercial passage

events.description: character approaches food vendor cart with grilling equipment
character enters narrow passage with pink neon lighting
character begins ascending second set of stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past a food vendor, then entering a narrow neon-lit alley and climbing stairs to an upper walkway

notable_agents.action: food vendor tending to grill cart with skewers of meat
person sitting on concrete bench using a device

entered.detail: mobile food cart with grilling surface and skewers of meat, emitting steam
commercial entrance with bright yellow door frame and glass windows
illuminated pink neon signage on building facade
suspended digital screen displaying advertisements above the alley
second flight of stairs leading to upper level between buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving through the sunlit plaza, the character passes a food vendor grilling skewers at a cart and people relaxing on benches. They then enter a narrow commercial passage illuminated by pink neon lights, heading toward a second staircase leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level back alleys with utility structures and graffiti

events.description: character navigates through tight corridor and descends slightly

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow upper-level back alleys with graffiti-covered walls and utility equipment

notable_agents.action: person in purple shirt walking away down the narrow passage

entered.detail: industrial building facade with rusted corrugated metal panels
cluster of green and gray electrical utility boxes with warning labels
multiple blue plastic garbage bags piled against walls
extensive red and white spray paint mural covering entire wall surface
rusted metal ladder and platform structure attached to building

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters a network of narrow upper-level back alleys. The passage is lined with corrugated metal buildings, electrical utility boxes, and piles of blue trash bags. Large graffiti murals cover the walls as the character navigates through the enclosed urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant urban district that transitions from wide, sunny commercial streets into a claustrophobic network of upper-level back alleys. It begins at a bright intersection by a green circular building, moving past neon storefronts before turning along a graffiti-covered teal wall. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts into a canyon-like street beneath a massive elevated highway, where monorail tracks cast striped shadows over billboards and passing trucks. The scene then narrows into a service alley lined with red vending machines, leading the character up concrete stairs and through a sunlit plaza featuring a food vendor. Finally, the camera passes through a pink neon-lit passage and ascends a second staircase, emerging into an enclosed corridor of corrugated metal buildings, utility boxes, and blue trash bags beneath large graffiti murals.
